title: Penne O Penne Lyrics Naan Sigappu Manithan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Penne O Penne
Singer: Vandhana Srinivasan & AI-Rufian
Music: GV Prakash
Movie: Naan sigappu manithan

Un aasai Kadhil Sonnaal niraivettruven
unakkaaga veiyilai kooda mazhaiyaakkuven
un peyarai solli solli
udhadugal thaeindhadhai
unakkindru yaar solvadhu.

Penne o penne
ivan asaigal ellaam eliyavaithaaney
Penne o penne
nee kettaa podhum

Penne o penne
ivan thevaigal ellaam therinjavai thaaney
Penne o penne
ondraai ovvondraai nee thandhaa podhum

Nee pillai pole thoonga
endhan thozhil naanum thottil seiven.
Anbaal thollai seidhu
unnai adimai seiven.

Nee kaattil pooththa poodhaan
veli potu unnai kaaval seiven
kaattrum unnai thottaal
udaney kaidhu seiven.

Unmele paithiyamaanen
thazhaikeelaai maariponen
un paarvai theendum podhu
kannaadi pole udaindheney.

Penne o penne
ivan asaigal ellaam eliyavaithaaney
Penne o penne
nee kettaa podhum

Penne o penne
ivan thevaigal ellaam therinjavai thaaney
Penne o penne
ondraai ovvondraai nee thandhaa podhum

Adi yedho puriyaa aasai
nenjin oram vandhu pookkal neetta.
Ennai enakke kadhal
ada da da pudhidhaai kaatta.

Ival yaaro yaaro endru
kadhin oram oru kelvi vaatta.
endhan paadhi endre
naanum unnai kaatta.

Engae nee irundhaai penne
eppadi ne enakkul vandhaai
un naale urakkam kettu
thannaale naanum ezhundheney.

Penne o penne
ivan asaigal ellaam eliyavaithaaney
Penne o penne
nee kettaa podhum

Penne o penne
ivan thevaigal ellaam therinjavai thaaney
Penne o penne
ondraai ovvondraai nee thandhaa podhum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Penne O Penne'?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and longing, capturing the essence of love and desire.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Naan Sigappu Manithan, the song highlights the protagonist's emotional journey and his affection towards his love interest.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of AI-Rufian and Vandhana Srinivasan.

Who composed the music for 'Penne O Penne'?

The music for this song was composed by GV PrakashKumar, known for his innovative soundscapes.

When was 'Penne O Penne' released?

The song was released on March 13, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Penne O Penne, the heartfelt lyrics and soothing melody create an atmosphere of romantic longing. The song captures the essence of love, portraying the protagonist's deep emotions and desires for his beloved. As part of the movie Naan Sigappu Manithan, it serves as a pivotal moment that reflects the character's internal struggles and affections. The collaboration between the singers and the music director adds a unique charm, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Penne O Penne from the movie Naan Sigappu Manithan is a captivating romantic duet that beautifully showcases the emotional depth of love. The unique collaboration between AI-Rufian and Vandhana Srinivasan brings a fresh vibe to the melody, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music. With GV PrakashKumar's enchanting composition, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love.
stanzaMeanings: If I express my desires, I will fulfill them for you. I will even bring rain for you. Who can say your name and help you?
Oh girl, all his wishes are fulfilled. Oh girl, just hearing you is enough.
Oh girl, he knows all his needs. Oh girl, just being with you is enough.
You sleep like a child, and I will cradle you in my work. I will serve you with love and make you my own.
You bloom like a flower, and I will protect you. If the wind touches you, I will capture you immediately.
I have become crazy about you and have changed my ways. When I look into your eyes, I feel like I have broken a mirror.
Oh girl, all his wishes are fulfilled. Oh girl, just hearing you is enough.
Oh girl, he knows all his needs. Oh girl, just being with you is enough.
Something is happening, and my heart is filled with desires. Show me your love, and I will be amazed.
Who is she? This question haunts me. I will show you that I am also yours.
Where have you been, girl? How did you come into my heart? I woke up today because of your dreams.
Oh girl, all his wishes are fulfilled. Oh girl, just hearing you is enough.
Oh girl, he knows all his needs. Oh girl, just being with you is enough.
